economic_notes: Sk'atsin Resources Ltd. (100% owned) and Sk'atsin Resources Limited Liability Partnership (99% owned) are government business enterprises accounted for using modified equity method. Partnership engaged in resource and economic development. Band provided guarantee for partnership bank indebtedness up to $75,000.
notes: GBEs (Sk'atsin Resources Ltd. and Sk'atsin Resources LLP) accounted for using modified equity method, not fully consolidated. Wages and benefits of $2,284,705 from segmented schedule. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $5,553,304 + FNHA $638,374 + FNESC $731,103 + Province of BC $4,928,660 + CMHC $192,234 + Ottawa Trust Funds income $30,440 = $12,073,115; however Ottawa Trust Funds income and FNESC are less clearly government transfers - total_government_transfers set to sum of ISC + FNHA + FNESC + BC + CMHC = $12,043,675; OSR = revenue minus government transfers. Long-term debt includes demand loans $280,593 + mortgages $310,372 + promissory note $2,192,409 = $2,783,374. Annual debt service from cash flow repayment of demand loans, mortgages and promissory note = $284,719. ISC funding represented 36% of gross revenues per Note A16.
